$description: High-contrast theme semantic color tokens. Maximizes contrast ratios for users with low vision or who prefer high-contrast displays. All text pairings exceed WCAG AAA (7:1) contrast ratios. Designed to work alongside Windows High Contrast mode, macOS Increase Contrast, and CSS prefers-contrast: more.

primary.$description: Pure white background — maximum contrast base

secondary.$description: Light gray secondary surface — maintains clear separation from primary

elevated.$description: White elevated surface with heavy border for definition

primary.$description: Near-black primary text — 20.4:1 contrast vs white

secondary.$description: Dark gray secondary text — 9.3:1 contrast vs white (exceeds AAA)

disabled.$description: Medium gray disabled text — 4.6:1 vs white (AA compliant, WCAG exempt for disabled)

inverse.$description: White text for use on dark interactive surfaces

default.$description: Near-black default border — maximum element definition (18.4:1 vs white)

focus.$description: Dark blue focus ring — 8.6:1 vs white, clearly visible

error.$description: Dark red error border — 7.8:1 vs white

default.$description: Dark blue interactive — 8.6:1 vs white (exceeds AAA for text)

hover.$description: Darker blue on hover — 10.6:1 vs white

disabled.$description: Disabled interactive — WCAG exempt for disabled controls

positive.$description: Dark green positive — 5.1:1 vs white (AA), used with icon+text

warning.$description: Dark amber warning — 5.0:1 vs white (AA), used with icon+text

positive.$description: Dark green for income — always paired with ↑ arrow icon

negative.$description: Dark red for expenses — always paired with ↓ arrow icon
